summary: Iteration 142 - Frontend testing for 7 UI restructuring changes. All 7 features tested and PASSED.

issues: ComplianceModal appears on every page visit - may need 'Don't show again' checkbox to persist across sessions

critical_code_review_comments: PersonalDashboard.jsx: 7 tabs correctly implemented - Overview, Net Worth, Investments, Retirement, Insights, Wealth Trends, Transactions

PersonalDashboard.jsx: 'Investments' tab shows InvestmentsOverview component with summary strip (Total Assets, Liabilities, Net Worth, Weighted Return, Holdings), Asset Allocation pie, Entity Breakdown bar, Top Holdings, Rebalancing data
PersonalDashboard.jsx: 'Transactions' tab shows alphabetically sorted investments list (BHP, Bitcoin, CBA, Colonial, David, Emergency...)
UnifiedInvestments.jsx: 11 tabs correctly implemented - Overview (first), Shares & ETFs, Bonds, Property, Crypto, Cash & TDs, Super & Pension, SMSF, Managed Funds, Unlisted, Rebalancing (last)
UnifiedInvestments.jsx: Overview tab shows InvestmentsOverview component with same data as Dashboard Investments tab
UnifiedInvestments.jsx: Rebalancing tab loads PortfolioRebalancing with embedded=true (no duplicate header)

navData.js: INVESTMENTS section has All Investments + Rebalancing. RESEARCH is separate section with Research Centre. PLANNING has Budget, Goals & Scenarios, Retirement only (no Rebalancing, no Research Centre)
InvestmentsOverview.jsx: Shared component with hardcoded PORTFOLIO_ASSETS and REBALANCING_DATA for consistency across Dashboard and /investments
seed_data_creation: None - uses hardcoded mock data in InvestmentsOverview.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 UI restructuring changes verified working. Personal Dashboard at /dashboard has 7 tabs: Overview/Net Worth/Investments/Retirement/Insights/Wealth Trends/Transactions. Investments tab shows InvestmentsOverview component. Transactions tab shows alphabetically sorted list. /investments page has 11 tabs with Overview first and Rebalancing last. Both Overview tabs show same InvestmentsOverview component. LHS sidebar: INVESTMENTS (All Investments, Rebalancing), PLANNING (Budget, Goals, Retirement), RESEARCH (Research Centre). ComplianceModal appears on first visit - dismiss by clicking checkbox + Accept button.

dashboard_7_tabs.details: 7 tabs present: Overview, Net Worth, Investments, Retirement, Insights, Wealth Trends, Transactions. All tabs have correct data-testid attributes.

dashboard_investments_tab.details: InvestmentsOverview component found with summary strip (Total Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200, Net Worth $1,608,800, Weighted Return +4.8%, Holdings 12), Asset Allocation pie chart, Holdings by Entity bar chart, Top Holdings, Portfolio Rebalancing section.

dashboard_transactions_tab.details: All Investments list sorted alphabetically: BHP Group Shares, Bitcoin (Coinbase), CBA Shares (DRP), Colonial First State Balanced, David - AustralianSuper, Emergency Fund - ING Savings, etc.

investments_11_tabs.details: 11 tabs present: Overview (first, active by default), Shares & ETFs, Bonds, Property, Crypto, Cash & TDs, Super & Pension, SMSF, Managed Funds, Unlisted, Rebalancing (last).

investments_overview_tab.details: InvestmentsOverview component found with same data as Dashboard Investments tab - Total Assets, Liabilities, Net Worth, Weighted Return, Holdings all matching.

investments_rebalancing_tab.details: PortfolioRebalancing component embedded with no duplicate header. Shows Total Portfolio $1,409,270, Risk Profile Balanced, Total Drift 65.0%, Trades Suggested 3. Sub-tabs: Analysis, Target Allocation, Rebalancing Trades, Settings.

sidebar_structure.details: INVESTMENTS section: All Investments (NEW), Rebalancing. PLANNING section: Budget (NEW), Goals & Scenarios, Retirement (PRO). RESEARCH section: Research Centre (NEW). Rebalancing correctly moved from Planning to Investments. Research Centre correctly in its own section.

mocked_apis_list: InvestmentsOverview uses hardcoded PORTFOLIO_ASSETS and REBALANCING_DATA
PortfolioRebalancing uses mock data for portfolio allocation
